# Gas Pseudo Critical Properties

**Summary**: The properties of a gas mixture at its pseudo-critical point.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1990-al-jarri|Al-Jarri, 1990]] developed correlations for gas pseudo-critical pressure and temperature.

## Scientific Context

- [[1990-al-jarri|Al-Jarri, 1990]] Used to characterize the behavior of hydrocarbon gas mixtures.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods



## Key Findings Across Sources

- Newer correlations were more accurate than Standing and Thomas et al. models. ([[1990-al-jarri|Al-Jarri, 1990, p. 109]])
- [[1990-al-jarri|Al-Jarri, 1990]] Pressure: 500-3500+ psi; Temperature: 450-750 Rankin
